entries.text: House special: "{table:gm/tavern/drink-name}" — a {pick:dark|pale|golden|crimson|cloudy|glittering|jet-black} {table:gm/tavern/drink-base} served {table:gm/tavern/drink-serving}. {pick:Locals swear|Regulars claim|The barkeep insists|No one can prove} it {table:gm/tavern/drink-effect}.
“This here’s a milk-only tavern, including all milk derivatives.”
